steps.title: Trace the passage order
steps.content: The text first describes a reissue project that replaces pseudonyms with authors’ given female names. It then introduces Rutigliano and other scholars’ response and explains why they see the project as lacking nuance.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content: Choice B invents a question about authorship. Choice C invents a literary movement and a study of it. Choice D wrongly suggests the scholars advanced the project’s assertion. The passage describes a project, introduces a scholarly stance responding to it, and gives support for that stance. The answer is A.
